title: Vivi Music v6.0.1 Released!
summary: We've shipped a major update with new equalizer presets and speed dial improvements.
content:
We are extremely excited to announce the release of Vivi Music v6.0.1! This update is packed with new features, performance enhancements, and customizer improvements.

### What's New:
- **Equalizer Presets**: Added 5 new high-fidelity equalizer presets tailored for various genres including Jazz, Classical, and Bass Boost.
- **Speed Dial**: Improved speed dial menu accessibility and response times.
- **UI Polish**: Refined dark mode contrast and corner styling across all main panels.

Thank you to all our open-source contributors who helped test and refine this build! Stay tuned for more amazing features coming next month.
author: Vividh
